name: list_documents
description: List all documents in your PandaDoc account with optional filtering. You can filter by status, search by name, filter by template, folder, or creation date range. Results are paginated.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query to filter documents by name.

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: Filter documents created from a specific template.

parameters.name: folder_uuid
parameters.description: Filter documents within a specific folder.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of documents to return per page (max 100).

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Sort field. Options: name, date_created, date_modified, date_completed.
